creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #2)
> WANT_GTK218 affects plist, not sure if PORTREVISION should be bumped.
> Probably yes as c6 landing obsoleted a few f10 packages on which gecko linux
> ports depend triggering a rebuild e.g., linux-f10-nspr,
> linux-f10-dbus-{glib,libs}.

Until c6 is made default, those f10 packages aren't deprecated.
As long as I can land 
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D819
I'm not sure PORTREVISION bumps are necessary due to its a) current brokenness and b) package rebuilds on wednesdays.
